title: Set Up BullMQ Job Queues with Redis
summary: Self-hosted job queue with BullMQ — producers, consumers (workers), delayed jobs, job priorities, rate limiting, and a dashboard UI with Bull Board.
declaration: I will set up BullMQ for background job processing in this project. This includes installing BullMQ and a Redis connection, creating a queue producer, a standalone worker process, and Bull Board for queue monitoring. I will NOT use Inngest, pg-boss, or cloud-managed queues. If you need a managed/serverless queue instead, say so before I begin.
